name: Saurbraten--Pennsylvania Dutch Cooking
recipeIngredient: 1 Chuck or pot roast, 2 inches thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat in a non-reactive dish or bowl and cover with a mixture of half vinegar and half water. Put in two large onions, sliced. Do this two or three days before the meat is wanted.
2. On the day before it is to be cooked, cut 4 slices of bacon into 1-inch pieces and chop 1 tablespoon of onion that has been soaking in vinegar. Cut holes in the meat 1 or 2 inches apart and stuff bits of the bacon and chopped onion into the holes.
3. Put the meat back into the solution, adding 1 tablespoon whole cloves and 1 teaspoon whole allspice. Bake the meat as a pot roast in part of the solution until tender.
4. Use more of the solution, adding sugar to taste, in making the gravy which will be almost black.
